# minio_license_info (Data Source)

Retrieves MinIO license information.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_license_info" "current" {}

output "license_plan" {
  value = data.minio_license_info.current.plan
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `issued_at` (String)
- `license_id` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `plan` (String)
- `trial` (Boolean)
